title: sm refit data payload
description: Refit protocol state record emitted by every `sm refit` mode (--start/--iterate/--skip/--finish). Carries the event name, current status, and the next action a consumer should take. Standalone events (preflight/blocker/lifecycle) emit only the shared keys; plan-snapshot events additionally carry branch/HEAD/index/gate and a current_item view of the active gate. The nested `schema` key stamps the refit protocol sub-document version (distinct from the envelope's schema). The envelope's exit_code reflects the true process exit (0 advance/success, 1 blocked/error).

schema.description: Version stamp of the refit protocol sub-document.
